items.title: Spider which uses spring trap to capture prey discovered in Australia
items.summary: Researchers say their hunting method - which allows them to prey on dangerous ants - is unprecedented.

items.title: Scientists discover hidden “footprints of death” that may help viruses spread
items.summary: Scientists have uncovered a surprising new twist in what happens when cells die. As dying cells break apart, they leave behind tiny “footprints of death” packed with newly discovered particles that help guide the immune system to clean up the remains. But researchers found that influenza viruses can

items.title: Scientists open a million-year-old time capsule hidden beneath New Zealand
items.summary: A cave in New Zealand has yielded fossils from a lost ecosystem that existed about 1 million years ago, including a possible flying ancestor of the kākāpō. The discovery reveals that volcanoes and climate upheaval were reshaping the country’s wildlife and driving extinctions long before humans arriv

items.title: Scientists discover ancient brain cells that help block distractions
items.summary: Scientists have discovered a tiny group of neurons in an ancient brain region that acts like a built-in focus filter, helping the brain ignore distractions and zero in on what matters most. items.title: Future astronauts could walk across rocks from deep inside the Moon
items.summary: A colossal ancient collision may have left some of the Moon’s deepest secrets surprisingly close to future Artemis landing sites.
